prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 47.1 kg; Height 150.1 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 143/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 239mg/dL; 9 months ago 245mg/dL; 6 months ago 193mg/dL; 3 months ago 194mg/dL; current 148mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 48.3kg; 9 months ago 46.7kg; 6 months ago 49.3kg; 3 months ago 50.3kg; current 47.1kg), Height (12 months ago 150.1cm; 9 months ago 150.1cm; 6 months ago 150.1cm; 3 months ago 150.1cm; current 150.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 143mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 90mmHg; 9 months ago 90mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 60U/L; 6 months ago 55U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 55U/L), AST (12 months ago 40U/L; 9 months ago 50U/L; 6 months ago 52U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 45U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 9.8mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.5mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 715mg/g; 9 months ago 955mg/g; 6 months ago 712mg/g; 3 months ago 693mg/g; current 944mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 121mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 120mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.86 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
